title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Maruti Suzuki India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Maruti Suzuki India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Maruti Suzuki India in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Maruti Suzuki India:
Maruti Suzuki India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maruti Suzuki India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
